emails.subject: Invoice charged twice
emails.body: Our team was billed two times for the April invoice after upgrading seats. Please reverse the duplicate charge today.

emails.subject: Locked out after phone reset
emails.body: I cannot complete sign-in because the 2FA codes are going to my old device and production deploys are blocked.

emails.subject: Need a copy of last month's invoice
emails.body: Could you send the March invoice PDF for our accounting records when you have a moment?

emails.subject: Do you offer annual pricing?
emails.body: I am comparing vendors and want to know whether you have an annual team plan with a discount.

emails.subject: Earn crypto rewards fast
emails.body: Click this private link now to unlock a wallet bonus and claim your free tokens instantly.

emails.subject: Export crashes halfway through
emails.body: Every CSV export from the dashboard fails at 52 percent and the browser shows a blank page.

emails.subject: Update billing address
emails.body: Please change the billing address on our account before the next invoice is generated.

emails.subject: Where is the API documentation?
emails.body: I am evaluating the product and need the API docs plus authentication overview for a prototype.

emails.subject: Refund request after accidental annual renewal
emails.body: Our subscription renewed yearly by mistake and finance needs a refund before close of business.

emails.subject: Webhook signatures no longer validate
emails.body: Production webhooks started failing signature checks this morning and our incident queue is growing.

emails.subject: Can I get a quote for 50 seats?
emails.body: We are planning a rollout next quarter and want a formal quote for fifty engineering seats.

emails.subject: Portal won't accept VAT number
emails.body: The billing page rejects our VAT number even though the format is correct for our country.

emails.subject: Top search ranking instantly
emails.body: Guaranteed SEO growth and backlinks in one hour. Reply now for exclusive access.

emails.subject: Desktop app freezes on startup
emails.body: The Windows desktop app hangs on the splash screen after the latest update.

emails.subject: Need to transfer account ownership
emails.body: Our admin left the company and I need instructions to transfer ownership of the workspace.

emails.subject: Receipt missing for March payment
emails.body: Please resend the receipt for the payment processed on March 18 so I can reconcile expenses.
